subcodes.first_line: The Spirit of the Bayán hath indeed been sent down, and yet they who are within the Bayán, and all the factions, have denied it, save those whom God hath preserved as a grace from His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزل روح البیان و انکروه من فی البیان ثم الاحزاب الا الذین حفظهم الله فضلا من عنده
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Muslims, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @proclamation to Jews, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
